function.description:
This tool MUST only be invoked as the last and final tool before returning the completed result to the caller.
<description>Decide whether to hand off to another agent or produce a final response.</description>
function.name: strands_structured_output

parameters.description: Decide whether to hand off to another agent or produce a final response.

agentId.description:
Target agent to hand off to. Omit to end the conversation.

Available agents:
- swarm-finisher: Finishes the test response.

context.description: Structured data to pass to the next agent.

message.description: Instructions for the next agent, or the final response if no handoff.
